title: Pre-trained Models Path
description: Build fluency in Pre-trained Models inside Graph Analysis by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: SwinIR
steps.summary: SwinIR belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Compare it with SwinIR-Small and CrossFormer. It opens into SwinIR-Small and SwinIR-Seg.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: CrossFormer
steps.summary: CrossFormer belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Compare it with CrossFormer-Small and SwinIR. It opens into CrossFormer-Small.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: SwinIR-Small
steps.summary: SwinIR-Small belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Start after SwinIR.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Whisper-Small
steps.summary: Whisper-Small belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Start after Whisper.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: CrossFormer-Small
steps.summary: CrossFormer-Small belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Start after CrossFormer.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: FocalNet-Small
steps.summary: FocalNet-Small belongs to the Graph Analysis area of AI/ML, within Pre-trained Models. It sits inside Graph Analysis / Pre-trained Models. Compare it with Whisper-Small and SwinIR-Small.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
